summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Leaderboard feature. All 19 backend API tests passed. Frontend UI testing confirmed all leaderboard features are working correctly: Leaderboard card on LearnPage, LeaderboardModal with age category selector, Your Ranking section, participant count, medal/crown icons for top 3, 'YOU' badge for current user, privacy protection (X*** for other users), and score calculation display.
passed_tests: GET /api/leaderboard/age_14 returns 200
Leaderboard response has correct structure (leaderboard, user_ranks, total_participants, age_category)
Leaderboard entry has required fields (rank, name, total_stars, current_streak, total_badges, score, is_current_user)
Namal is rank #1 in age_14 category with score 42.4
Score calculation verified: stars×3 + streak×2 + badges×5 + attempts×0.1
Privacy protection - other users' names masked as X***
Current user's children show full names
is_current_user flag correctly identifies user's children
user_ranks array has correct structure
GET /api/leaderboard/global/top returns 200
Global leaderboard has correct structure (top_global, total_participants)
Global leaderboard entries include age field
Global leaderboard also masks other users' names
All 9 age categories return valid responses
Empty category returns valid structure
Leaderboard sorted by score descending
Ranks are sequential starting from 1
Leaderboard requires authentication (401 without token)
Global leaderboard requires authentication
UI: Leaderboard card on LearnPage with crown icon
UI: 'Compete with students your age!' text present
UI: LeaderboardModal opens when clicking card
UI: Age category selector dropdown works
UI: 'Your Ranking' section shows user's children with ranks
UI: 'X students competing' participant count displayed
UI: Crown icon (👑) for rank 1, medals for ranks 2-3
UI: 'YOU' badge shown for current user's entries
UI: Privacy - other users show as 'S***', 'T***' etc.
UI: Score calculation explanation displayed
UI: Category switching works (tested Age 14, Age 7, Ages 5-6)
seed_data_creation: Namal has: 8 total stars, 1 day streak, 3 badges (first_star, five_stars, never_give_up), Score: 42.4 points
context_for_next_testing_agent: Leaderboard feature fully tested and working. API endpoints: GET /api/leaderboard/{age_category} returns ranked students with privacy protection, GET /api/leaderboard/global/top returns top 20 across all ages. Score formula: stars×3 + streak×2 + badges×5 + attempts×0.1. Namal (child ID cd57e76c-02e9-4276-a7c5-f0f7588a9670) is #1 in age_14 with 42.4 points. Privacy protection masks other users' names as first letter + '***'. Current user's children show full names with is_current_user=true flag.

leaderboard_card.status: Working - shows crown icon, 'Leaderboard' title, 'Compete with students your age!' text

leaderboard_modal.status: Working - opens on card click, shows full leaderboard UI

age_category_selector.status: Working - dropdown with all 9 age categories (age_5_6 through age_14)

your_ranking_section.status: Working - shows user's children with their ranks, stars, and scores

you_badge.status: Working - 'YOU' badge shown for current user's entries

privacy_protection.status: Working - other users' names show as first letter + '***' (e.g., 'S***', 'T***')

score_calculation.status: Working - displayed in 'How scoring works' section

api_endpoints.age_category: GET /api/leaderboard/{age_category} - returns top 50 for specific age
api_endpoints.global_top: GET /api/leaderboard/global/top - returns top 20 across all ages
